name: env-persist
description: Save, reload, and exec in saved environments, collapsing long cd+venv+export chains into one step.

parameters.name: --save
parameters.description: Save env vars for a directory: --save <dir> [--venv <path>] KEY=VAL ...

parameters.name: --load
parameters.description: Print saved env vars as shell commands: --load <dir>

parameters.name: --exec
parameters.description: Run a command in saved environment: --exec <dir> <command...>

cost_saving_rationale: Saves 5K-10K chars per repeated cd+venv+export chain by persisting once and reloading or exec'ing in one step.
